message:
Running command: # state_out.json created. Now check what step comes AFTER step 32 (GlobalRouting).
# In LibreLane 2.4.6, after GRT is DetailedRouting (DRT via TritonRoute).
# We need to restart librelane with --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting

# First, check what step IDs are available  
/home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane --help 2>&1 | grep -A5 "from\|resume\|step" | head -20
